{{Quote|Thirty-five standard years ago, I became the last guardian of an ancient order that had thrived for a thousand generations. During all that time, no evil dared challenge its power, no honest being ever questioned its integrity. Yet fall it did, brought low by the treachery of a Sith Lord who disguised himself as a friend and an ally. Only a handful of Masters survived, hiding in deserts and swamps so that the bright light that was the Jedi order would not be extinguished.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Dark Nest III: The Swarm War">''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''</ref>}}
The '''Conclave on Ossus''' was the first full [[Jedi Convocation]] of the [[New Jedi Order]], taking place on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].

{{Stub}}

==The conclave==
During the convocation, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] declared himself the [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] of the [[New Jedi Order]], and declared that the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] would serve the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. He also commanded that the Jedi had to put the good of the Order above everything else, or they should resign. [[Danni Quee]] resigned, citing that her life was on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] now, as did [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], as she was [[Queen Mother]] of [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]], and she needed to continue to be Queen mother for the foreseeable future to prevent a civil war. [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] attempted to resign over his role in the schisms the Order had been experiencing, but Skywalker refused it, saying that Horn should stop shouldering the blame for the disagreements and for the [[Battle of Ithor|Destruction of Ithor]].
